content:
The way we build with Angular continues to evolve. From AI agents helping us write code to smarter performance patterns, our community experts are documenting every step of this evolution.
Get up to speed with these essential resources:
Stop Writing Outdated Angular Code: MCP, Cursor & Claude
Daniel Herrera Sanchez (@weincoder) explores how to revolutionize your development environment. Learn how to set up the Model Context Protocol (MCP) with Cursor and Claude to write cleaner, modern Angular code automatically.
Read the guide: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/vistas-diferidas-en-angular-defer-mejora-de-paso-herrera-sanchez-w77ke/
Deferred Views (@defer): Step-by-Step Performance
Boost your Core Web Vitals! Daniel Herrera Sanchez (@weincoder) provides a practical tutorial on using the @defer syntax to load components only when they are needed, significantly improving your app’s initial load time.
Watch the tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ulwxxNZ6Vpo&t=76s
Angular 21 MCP: 7 Tools You Should Know
Alisa Duncan breaks down the essential MCP toolkit for Angular 21. Discover 5 stable tools to use today and 2 experimental ones that represent the future of AI-assisted coding.
Explore the tools: https://dev.to/angular/a-quick-vibe-code-experiment-with-angulars-mcp-server-3g2h
A Quick Vibe Code Experiment with Angular’s MCP Server
Damian Sire (@damiansire) takes a creative look at the Angular MCP Server, experimenting with “Vibe Coding” to see how AI can understand and generate complex Angular patterns through simple context.
Check out the experiment: https://dev.to/damiansiredev/evolution-in-form-validators-goodbye-customerror-hello-plain-objects-4c35
Evolution in Form Validators: Goodbye customError
Modeste ASSIONGBON (@rblmdst) highlights a significant clean-up in form logic in this post. Learn how the transition to plain objects for validators makes your code more readable and easier to maintain.
Watch the update: https://youtu.be/452hcBDOv2w
The Next Generation: A Practical Guide to Signal Forms
Ready to move past traditional forms? Modeste ASSIONGBON (@rblmdst) provides a hands-on guide to Signal Forms, showing you how to implement the most reactive form state management Angular has ever seen.
Watch the practical guide: https://youtu.be/6yWfwir-pX8
Are you using AI agents or MCP in your daily Angular workflow yet? We’d love to see the prompts or tools that are saving you the most time!
Share the innovation and help others modernize their dev stack 👇
Modernize Your Workflow: AI Tooling, Deferrable Views, and the Era of Forms! 🛠️ was originally published in Angular Blog on Medium, where people are continuing the conversation by highlighting and responding to this story.
